newsSince: Modestly positive optics evidence, consistent with thesis: 800G modules now mass-shipped, 1.6T modules at small-batch delivery and in customer verification, and Accelink has sent 1.6T CPO optical-engine samples to overseas customers. No new earnings or named contract since June 9; the +27% since June 9 is largely flow into the optics melt-up.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list: 1.6T small-batch + CPO optical-engine samples to overseas customers mildly strengthen the scale-out optics choke-point case vs June 9. But at 277% YTD and +27% since June 9 it is no longer under-owned, so the modest fundamental tick is offset; hold the rank.
verdicts.bull: 800G volume, 1.6T ramping, 1.6T CPO engine sampled overseas; scale-out bandwidth choke point.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis confirmed but progress is incremental, no named DC win.
verdicts.bear: 277% YTD, +27% since June 9; crowded, residual alpha thin, China-optics competition.
